studies.title: DiGA Cara Care für Reizdarm - Evaluation of a non-invasive, non-additionally burdensome, prospective, multicentered, two-armed, randomized trial with parallel group design

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'Cara Care für Reizdarm', as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name in the title, full text, and trial registration. The study evaluates the effectiveness of this specific app for treating irritable bowel syndrome.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, multicentered, two-armed, randomized trial with a parallel group design, which indicates that it is an interventional, experimental study with random allocation to intervention and control groups, characteristic of an RCT.
